description_long: This is a broken ceramic bowl with a wide, shallow form and a circular base. The bowl's rim is heavily chipped and incomplete, exposing jagged edges and missing sections. Its interior surface is off-white with faded greenish-blue painted motifs, possibly abstract or floral, distributed around the inner wall. The exterior is a natural terracotta color, showing the raw ceramic material. The bowl's surface appears matte and slightly rough, with visible imperfections and signs of age. The object is hollow and lightweight, typical of hand-crafted pottery.
description: A broken, shallow ceramic bowl with chipped edges, off-white interior, and faded greenish-blue painted motifs.
description_view_0: This view highlights the bowl's largest missing section and shows two prominent greenish-blue motifs on the interior.
description_view_1: This angle reveals a more continuous rim section and a central swirl motif, with less visible chipping.
description_view_2: This view displays the bowl's jagged rim and two curved motifs, emphasizing the bowl's shallow depth.
description_view_3: This side shows a large chipped area and a faded motif, with the terracotta exterior more visible.
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding food, possibly historical or decorative use
attribute_decorative_patterns: faded greenish-blue abstract or floral motifs painted on the interior surface
